Licensed & Insured 24/7 Service Serving Chicagoland

Commercial Plumbing | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Commercial Plumbing in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

Ensure your business has a handle on its water-related needs with commercial plumbing services in Chicago. Your facilities probably see more frequent use than those in homes or apartments, and more frequent use typically means higher repair costs. Luckily, regular maintenance and high-quality repair services by commercial plumbers can help you stay on budget while maintaining smooth business operations.

Whether you need the drains cleaned in your customer bathrooms, sump pump repair in your warehouse or new restaurant plumbing fixtures installed, Plumbers 911 stands ready to help with 24/7 service. We refer you to local commercial plumbers in every area of the city, from Lawndale and the Loop to Uptown and Rogers Park, we assist you in finding a licensed professional who understands the plumbing challenges and concerns in your locale.

In addition to emergency retail, kitchen and hospital plumbing, we also connect you with commercial plumbers who can assist you with fixture installations and remodeling projects. To find the right commercial plumbing professional for your business, just call Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911).

Why You Might Need Commercial Plumbing

Whether your business location sees lots of foot traffic, operates by appointment or serves as a work space for your employees, it probably uses a water source such as restrooms or sprinklers. Wear and tear over time in those water-related systems has the potential to cause major damage due to leaky or burst pipes, clogged drains and septic tank or sewer issues.

Since big problems with your pipes can lead to a big loss of revenue due to closures, our high-quality commercial plumbing service can keep you afloat with licensed professionals who do the job right the first time. The commercial plumbers referred by Plumbers 911 also aid you in preventing problems before they occur.

Inspection services that send a camera into your shop’s pipes and sewer lines can ward off clogs by fixing low-flow issues as they’re noticed, while commercial kitchen plumbing services such as grease trap cleaning keeps your dining establishment running efficiently. When you’re looking to expand your reach, Plumbers 911 has you covered with commercial plumbers that install outdoor kitchens and provide sub-metering solutions in rental units.

Commercial Plumbing Services in Chicago

Plumbers 911 carefully selects the contractors it refers based on their knowledge and skills, with most having tenures of over a decade in the industry. Additionally, all our commercial plumbing professionals have licenses and insurance for extra quality assurance.

To further improve your safety and satisfaction, we require all our contractors to pass random drug tests. When you call Plumbers 911 for a referral, our commercial, retail and restaurant plumbing professionals typically arrive same day for emergency situations. In non-emergency situations, they usually come the next day to save you money on overtime costs.

No matter if you need someone to unclog a toilet in your employee restrooms, install showers in your bed and breakfast or remodel the bathrooms in your assisted living facility, the professionals sent by Plumbers 911 arrive on time and ready to service your plumbing needs.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

Let Plumbers 911 refer you to highly trained commercial plumbing experts who know how to solve your problem quickly and efficiently. When your business is on the line, you require the same level of professionalism you extend to your customers and clients. That's why we require all our contractors to have extensive training before we send them out to work for you. Discover what Plumbers 911 can do for you when you need emergency or by appointment commercial plumbing in Chicago by calling 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911).

Commercial Plumbing Services & Pricing

Commercial plumbing costs vary significantly based on the scope of work:

  • Commercial drain cleaning — $200-$800
  • Grease trap installation/cleaning — $300-$2,000
  • Backflow preventer testing & certification — $100-$300
  • Commercial water heater service — $300-$1,500
  • Tenant improvement plumbing — Custom quotes based on scope
  • Preventive maintenance contracts — Monthly plans available

We serve restaurants, retail, offices, multi-unit residential, and industrial facilities throughout Chicago. Call 833-758-6911 for a commercial plumbing consultation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer commercial plumbing maintenance contracts?

Yes, we offer preventive maintenance plans for commercial properties. Regular maintenance prevents costly emergencies and ensures compliance with Chicago plumbing codes. Plans include scheduled inspections, drain cleaning, water heater service, and priority emergency response.

Can you work around our business hours?

Absolutely. We understand that plumbing work in commercial spaces needs to minimize business disruption. We offer after-hours, weekend, and overnight service to accommodate your schedule.

Are you licensed for commercial plumbing in Chicago?

Yes, all our plumbers are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for both residential and commercial work in Chicago and throughout Illinois. We carry the required liability and workers' compensation insurance for commercial projects.

Ready to get started? Call Plumbers 911 Chicago at 833-758-6911 for a Licensed, bonded, and insured. Available 24/7.

Need Commercial Plumbing?

Our licensed plumbers are available 24/7 for emergency and scheduled service.
